name: Verify
prose: Two layers. Layer 1 (static): run build, vet, and test, including frontend assertions — template manifest completeness, CSS link validation, orphan template detection. Layer 2 (runtime): run smoke tests — app boot, primary flow, moving parts connect. Coordinator writes runbook, spawns verify agent.

items.text: Layer 1 (static): run build, vet, and test, including frontend assertions — template manifest completeness, CSS link validation, orphan template detection.
Layer 2 (runtime): run smoke tests — app boot, primary flow, moving parts connect.

gates.text: Coordinator writes runbook, spawns verify agent.

cross_refs.text: PP-DELIVER-3 (not done until all tests pass)
PP-DELIVER-5 (state coverage, not just code coverage)
CA-TEST-1, CA-TEST-2 (behavior not implementation, structured by use case)
TDD-BUG-1 through TDD-BUG-4 (bug fix protocol — reproduce, confirm, fix, full suite)
